Hero.client_desc: Post your need (plumbing, painting, cleaning, etc.), receive multiple offers from qualified local workers, negotiate rates in real-time, and pay directly.
Hero.worker_desc: Join as a Worker, set your work radius, and get instantly notified of client requests in your area. Send offers, chat directly, and build your reputation.

Footer.desc: The leading mobile platform connecting local services. Helping build trusted communities by connecting clients with the best local talent without intermediaries.
Footer.newsletter_desc: Get notified about new specialties in your area and new app version releases.
Footer.rights: © {year} Chamba App Inc. All rights reserved.

Features.client_feat_1_desc: Describe your problem, set a reference budget, and upload photos from the app. No posting fees.
Features.client_feat_2_desc: Compare quotes from multiple workers in minutes. Make counteroffers and agree on a fair price.
Features.client_feat_3_desc: Watch your professional's journey in real-time on the map to know exactly when they will arrive at your door.
Features.client_feat_4_desc: Review profiles, photos of previous work, and ratings from other clients to hire the ideal professional.
Features.worker_feat_1_desc: Choose how many kilometers around you want to cover (e.g. 5km). We only notify you of requests within your zone.
Features.worker_feat_2_desc: Send custom offers based on difficulty: charge per full job (fixed price), per hour, or per day.
Features.worker_feat_3_desc: Clarify doubts, ask for more photos, and agree on details and materials directly in the private chat.
Features.worker_feat_4_desc: Every successfully completed job and every 5-star review increases your visibility to attract more clients.
Features.title: Everything you need in one App
Features.subtitle: Specially designed to make local work more agile, secure, and transparent.

HowItWorks.title: How does Chamba work?
HowItWorks.subtitle: A simplified step-by-step process so you can reach your goals quickly.
HowItWorks.client_step_1_desc: Specify the category, upload photos, and propose a reference budget. It takes less than a minute.
HowItWorks.client_step_2_desc: Qualified workers in your area get geo-alerts and send you real-time quotes.
HowItWorks.client_step_3_desc: Use the built-in app chat to ask questions, propose counteroffers, and hire the perfect professional.
HowItWorks.client_step_4_desc: The pro does the job, you release the payment once satisfied, and leave a review.
HowItWorks.worker_step_1_desc: Sign up with your info, select your technical skills, and add your certifications or trades.
HowItWorks.worker_step_2_desc: Determine your notification radius (e.g. 5km). You'll only get job alerts in that area.
HowItWorks.worker_step_3_desc: Review local requests, calculate your labor costs, and send your offer directly to the client.
HowItWorks.worker_step_4_desc: Perform the hired job, confirm your arrival via GPS, finish the task, and get paid directly.

Categories.title: Most Requested Categories
Categories.subtitle: Thousands of people search for these services every week. Find qualified experts in your area, ready to work today.
Categories.cta_desc: Chamba is open: post any task or service and get offers from professionals near you.
Categories.cat_1_desc: Interior and exterior painting, facade touch-ups, and finishes.
Categories.cat_2_desc: Repair of pipes, faucets, water leaks, and toilets.
Categories.cat_3_desc: Installation of lights, wiring, short circuits, and panels.
Categories.cat_4_desc: Lawn mowing, garden design, irrigation, and maintenance.
Categories.cat_5_desc: Freight, moving, courier, and goods transfer.
Categories.cat_6_desc: Deep cleaning of apartments, offices, and post-construction.
Categories.cat_8_desc: Furniture assembly, door repair, drawers, and locks.
Categories.cat_9_desc: Light roadside assistance, tire change, battery, and tuning.
Categories.cat_10_desc: Moving helpers, rack assembly, and various tasks.

AboutUs.p1: It all started by observing my own environment. I saw talented, hardworking people struggling to find clients consistently. At the same time, I saw frustrated neighbors and friends wasting time trying to find someone reliable for an urgent home repair.
AboutUs.p2_part1: There was a huge gap between the
AboutUs.p3_part1: As a creator, I decided that technology should serve to close that gap. That's how
AboutUs.p3_part3: was born. My goal wasn't just to build an app, but to build a tool that empowers people: allowing independent workers to offer their services at their own pace, and clients to find reliable help in minutes, not days.
AboutUs.vision_desc: A community where finding work is simple.

Stats.stat_1_desc: Domestic services and repairs successfully executed on the platform.
Stats.stat_2_desc: Excellent reputation built thanks to the commitment and quality of our workers.
Stats.stat_3_desc: Our geolocation network ensures instant offers from nearby technicians.
Stats.stat_4_desc: Post requests completely free of charge and pay directly to the agreed professional.

Testimonials.title: What our users say
Testimonials.subtitle: Discover the stories of satisfied clients and local professionals driving their daily economy.
Testimonials.rev_1_comment: I had an urgent water leak in the kitchen on a Saturday night. I posted on Chamba and within 5 minutes Roberto sent a quote. We negotiated a fair price via chat and it was fixed in half an hour. A lifesaver!
Testimonials.rev_2_comment: Being able to set my work radius to 5km around me has changed my life. I save time and transport costs, and direct rate negotiation allows me to value my labor well.
Testimonials.rev_3_comment: With Chamba I have managed to get constant clients in my area. The app is super intuitive, notifies you instantly, and the profile with reviews helps me build immediate trust with new people.
Testimonials.rev_4_comment: I used to rely on word of mouth or sticking ads on the street. Now I open Chamba and see real job offers in my neighborhood every day. My monthly income has gone up 40%.

CTA.client_title: Ready to solve your household tasks?
CTA.worker_title: Ready to earn more with your trade?
CTA.client_desc: Download Chamba App today. Post your first request for free and connect with verified workers in your neighborhood instantly.
CTA.worker_desc: Download the app, register as a professional, and start receiving local job offers in your area. The control is yours!

WorkerRegistrationForm.error_msg: There was a problem submitting your registration. Please try again.
WorkerRegistrationForm.title: Be your own boss
WorkerRegistrationForm.subtitle: Sign up and get job offers directly on your WhatsApp.
WorkerRegistrationForm.terms_disclaimer: By registering, you agree that we may contact you via WhatsApp to inform you about job opportunities.
WorkerRegistrationForm.success_msg: We have saved your details. You will soon receive a WhatsApp message with instructions to download the app and start receiving offers.
